articles.title: Statistics Canada to release consumer price index for May this morning
articles.description: OTTAWA — Statistics Canada will release its latest reading for May inflation today. High oil and gasoline prices are expected to push inflation higher for the month.

articles.title: Airline ticket prices may stay high as carriers bank fuel relief from Iran deal
articles.description: Airlines stand to save billions of dollars on jet fuel after an interim U.S.-Iran peace deal sent oil prices lower, but passengers are unlikely to see immediate relief as tight ​capacity may allow carriers to keep fares well above pre-war levels.

articles.description: Airlines are poised to save billions on jet fuel due to lower oil prices, but passengers may not see immediate relief as carriers maintain high fares due to limited capacity.

articles.title: Oil falls after US-Iran talks conclude in Switzerland
articles.description: NEW DELHI: Oil prices declined on Monday after U.S.-Iran talks concluded in Switzerland with Tehran saying it had secured waivers for oil and petrochemical exports, easing worries about a supply shortage in global markets.
